docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-13-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUN-26-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK N.A. AS ACQUIRER OF CERTAIN ASSESTS AND LIABILITIES OF WASHINGTON MUTUAL BANK FROM FEDERAL DEPOSIT INSURANCE CORPORATION ACTING RECEIVER'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS TRANSFERRED TO DEPARTMENT 501 TO BE HEARD ON AUGUST 9, 2013, AT 9:30 A.M. THAT DEPARTMENT HANDLES ALL FORECLOSURE RELATED MATTERS. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN #6185.
